label: Template Dependency Risk
description: Heavy reliance on templates without understanding the underlying governance produces worlds that look complete but lack structural coherence.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Builder relies heavily on templates with low invariant quality (<50%).
causal_translation.rule_text: Templates provide structure but not understanding. If the builder doesn't grasp why invariants exist, they can't adapt governance for their domain.
causal_translation.shift_text: The world looks complete but is structurally hollow. Invariants are inherited, not authored.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced by 30%. Governance is inherited, not understood.
